topbar.title: Facility service desk
subject: Subject
sla_tooltip_historical: This ticket predates the SLA engine.
sla_tooltip_paused: Waiting on customer; SLA clock paused.
invitations.form_description: The invitee receives an email with a one-time link. They set their own password when accepting and join with the role and scope you pick here.
invitations.expires_note: Invitation links expire after 7 days. Pending invitations can be revoked at any time.
invitations.empty_desc: When you invite teammates, they'll appear here grouped by status.
invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.buildings_hint: Pick one or more buildings the invitee will manage.
invitations.customers_hint: Pick one or more customers the invitee will manage.
invitations.dialog_revoke_body: The invitation link will stop working immediately. You can send a new one if you change your mind.
admin.empty_filtered_desc: Try clearing filters or switching the status tab.
users.empty_initial_desc: Invite the first user to get started.
companies.empty_initial_desc_admin: Create the first company to get started.
companies.empty_initial_desc_other: Ask a super admin to create one.
buildings.empty_initial_desc: Create the first building to get started.
customers.empty_initial_desc: Create the first customer to get started.
user_form.card_label_desc: Email, name, language and role for this user.
user_form.role_disabled_actor: (only super admins can manage this role)
user_form.memberships_desc: Read-only summary. Memberships are managed from the entity detail pages.
user_form.dialog_deactivate_body: They will lose access immediately. Their data and history are kept; a super admin can reactivate them later.
user_form.dialog_reactivate_body: Reactivating restores their account. They will regain access using their existing password (or can request a reset).
company_form.forbidden_desc: Only super admins can create new companies. Ask one to create it for you, or edit an existing company below.
company_form.slug_placeholder: Leave blank to auto-generate from the name
company_form.section_admins_desc: Company admins linked to this company. Add an existing user below; new users come in via invitations.
company_form.dialog_deactivate_body: It will be hidden from non-super-admin users. Tickets attached to it remain visible to staff.
company_form.dialog_reactivate_body: Reactivating restores it for all roles. Existing memberships and tickets are unchanged.
company_form.dialog_remove_body: Their other memberships are unaffected. They can be re-added later.
building_form.card_label_desc: Company, name and address of this location.
building_form.section_managers_desc: Building managers assigned to this building. Add an existing user below; new users come in via invitations.
building_form.dialog_deactivate_body: It will be hidden from non-super-admin users. Tickets attached to it remain visible to staff.
building_form.dialog_reactivate_body: Reactivating restores it for all roles. Existing memberships and tickets are unchanged.
building_form.dialog_remove_body: Their other memberships are unaffected. They can be re-added later.
customer_form.section_users_desc: Customer users linked to this customer. Add an existing user below; new users come in via invitations.
customer_form.dialog_deactivate_body: It will be hidden from non-super-admin users. Tickets attached to it remain visible to staff.
customer_form.dialog_reactivate_body: Reactivating restores it for all roles. Existing memberships and tickets are unchanged.
customer_form.dialog_remove_body: Their other memberships are unaffected. They can be re-added later.
customer_form.section_buildings_desc: Buildings this customer operates at. A ticket can only be raised for a customer-and-building pair that is linked here.
customer_form.dialog_unlink_building_bod: Customer-user access for this building under this customer will also be revoked. Tickets already created for this pair stay in the audit log.
customer_form.access_no_buildings: No building access yet — this user cannot see any tickets under this customer.
customer_form.dialog_revoke_access_body: They will no longer see tickets at this building under this customer. Other building access is unaffected.
accept_invitation.missing_token_desc: The link in your email did not include a token. Open the email and click the link again, or ask the person who invited you for a fresh invitation.
accept_invitation.not_found_desc: The invitation token does not match anything on file. It may have already been used or revoked.
accept_invitation.gone_desc: This invitation is {{status}}. Ask the person who invited you to send a new one.
accept_invitation.welcome_lead: {{inviter}} invited you to join CleanOps as {{role}}.
accept_invitation.password_requirements_: Use at least 8 characters. Avoid very common or all-numeric passwords.
accept_invitation.error_passwords_dont_m: The two passwords do not match.
accept_invitation.error_user_exists_desc: An account with this email already exists. Sign in with your existing password.
accept_invitation.error_generic_desc: We couldn't accept the invitation. Please try again or contact support.
error_boundary.title: Something went wrong
error_boundary.description: An unexpected error stopped the page from loading. Reload to try again. If this keeps happening, please contact support.
audit_logs.title: Audit log
audit_logs.intro: Every create, update, and delete on tracked records lands here. Filter by record type, record id, or actor to investigate a specific change.
audit_logs.empty_initial_desc: Entries appear here automatically as soon as a tracked record is created, updated, or deleted.
audit_logs.empty_filtered_title: No audit entries match your filters
audit_logs.empty_filtered_desc: Try widening the date range or clearing the filters.
api_error.session_expired: Your session expired. Sign in again to continue.
api_error.not_allowed: You don't have permission to perform this action.
api_error.not_found: We couldn't find what you were looking for. It may have been deleted or moved.
api_error.invalid_input: Some of the values you entered are not valid. Please check the form and try again.
api_error.too_many_requests: Too many requests in a short time. Please wait a moment and try again.
api_error.server_unavailable: The server is having trouble right now. Please try again in a few seconds.
api_error.network: We can't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
api_error.unexpected: Something unexpected happened. Please try again.
staff_requests.title: Staff assignment requests
staff_requests.intro: Staff request assignment to a ticket they are eligible to work on. Building managers and OSIUS admins review the queue here.
staff_requests.empty_desc: Staff requests appear here when a field-staff member asks to be assigned to a ticket they have building visibility for.
staff_requests.empty_filtered_desc: Switch to 'All' to see requests that have already been approved, rejected, or cancelled.
staff_requests.reviewer_note_placeholder: e.g. assigned to the Tuesday crew
staff_requests.review_dialog_approve_int: Approving assigns {{staff}} to ticket {{ticket}}. They'll be able to work on it immediately.
staff_requests.review_dialog_reject_intr: Rejecting closes {{staff}}'s request for ticket {{ticket}}. They'll be free to request other tickets.
customer_form.contact_visibility_helper: Choose what the customer’s users see about the OSIUS field staff assigned to their tickets. Switching everything off shows a generic “Assigned to the OSIUS team” label instead.
staff_admin.profile_desc: Contact details and operational flags for this staff member. Customers see only the fields you enable on the customer record.
staff_admin.field_internal_note_placehol: Scheduling notes, never shown to customers.
staff_admin.field_can_request_assignment: Allow this staff to request assignment
When off, the staff member cannot send 'I want to do this work' requests for any building.
staff_admin.field_is_active_hint: Turning this off pauses the staff member operationally. Their account stays signed-in capable; use Deactivate above to fully disable login.
staff_admin.visibility_title: Buildings this staff can work in
staff_admin.visibility_desc: Each building below grants this staff member read access to its tickets and lets them request assignment on them. Add or remove buildings to change where they can operate.
staff_admin.visibility_no_rows: No buildings yet — this staff member only sees tickets they are directly assigned to.
staff_admin.visibility_can_request_hint: Per-building override. When the staff profile flag above is off, this stays off too.
staff_admin.dialog_remove_body: {{email}} will lose visibility on this building's tickets immediately. Already-assigned tickets stay assigned.
